import json, re, pandas as pd

# load businesses from file
path = var_call_z1licC53ktRc2nfrNGYufAoM
with open(path, 'r') as f:
    biz = json.load(f)

df_b = pd.DataFrame(biz)
# normalize review_count to int
if 'review_count' in df_b.columns:
    df_b['review_count'] = pd.to_numeric(df_b['review_count'], errors='coerce').fillna(0).astype(int)

# extract state from description (last ", XX," or end " XX")
pat = re.compile(r"\b([A-Z]{2})\b(?=,|\.|\s)" )

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc, str):
        return None
    m = re.findall(r"\b[A-Z]{2}\b", desc)
    # prefer known states list
    states = set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])
    m2 = [x for x in m if x in states]
    return m2[-1] if m2 else None

df_b['state'] = df_b['description'].apply(extract_state)

# determine state with highest total reviews (sum of business review_count)
state_reviews = df_b.groupby('state', dropna=True)['review_count'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state = state_reviews.index[0]
top_state_total_reviews = int(state_reviews.iloc[0])

# compute avg rating of businesses in that state based on review table ratings
rev = pd.DataFrame(var_call_8pw8v7DUMHjpgUNbH5wjf60S)
rev['n_reviews'] = pd.to_numeric(rev['n_reviews'])
rev['avg_rating'] = pd.to_numeric(rev['avg_rating'])
# map businessid_ -> businessref_
df_b['business_ref'] = df_b['business_id'].str.replace('businessid_', 'businessref_', regex=False)
state_biz_refs = set(df_b.loc[df_b['state']==top_state, 'business_ref'].dropna())
rev_state = rev[rev['business_ref'].isin(state_biz_refs)].copy()
# weighted avg by number of reviews
weighted_avg = float((rev_state['avg_rating'] * rev_state['n_reviews']).sum() / rev_state['n_reviews'].sum()) if len(rev_state)>0 else None

out = {
    'state': top_state,
    'total_reviews_in_state': top_state_total_reviews,
    'avg_business_rating_in_state': weighted_avg,
    'ratings_review_count_used': int(rev_state['n_reviews'].sum()) if len(rev_state)>0 else 0,
    'n_businesses_in_state': int((df_b['state']==top_state).sum())
}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))

def extract_state(desc):
    if not isinstance(desc,str):
        return None
    tokens = re.findall(r"\\b[A-Z]{2}\\b", desc)
    states = set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])
    tokens = [t for t in tokens if t in states]
    return tokens[-1] if tokens else None

states_series = df['description'].apply(extract_state)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({'n_with_state': int(states_series.notna().sum()), 'unique_states': sorted([x for x in states_series.dropna().unique()])[:20], 'head': states_series.head(10).tolist()}))

    biz=json.load(f)
df_b=pd.DataFrame(biz)
df_b['review_count']=pd.to_numeric(df_b['review_count'], errors='coerce').fillna(0).astype(int)

states=set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])

    return toks[-1] if toks else None

df_b['state']=df_b['description'].apply(ext)
state_reviews=df_b.dropna(subset=['state']).groupby('state')['review_count'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state=state_reviews.index[0]
top_total=int(state_reviews.iloc[0])

import json, re, pandas as pd
path=var_call_z1licC53ktRc2nfrNGYufAoM
with open(path,'r') as f:
    biz=json.load(f)
df_b=pd.DataFrame(biz)
df_b['review_count']=pd.to_numeric(df_b['review_count'], errors='coerce').fillna(0).astype(int)

states=set(['AL','AK','AZ','AR','CA','CO','CT','DE','FL','GA','HI','ID','IL','IN','IA','KS','KY','LA','ME','MD','MA','MI','MN','MS','MO','MT','NE','NV','NH','NJ','NM','NY','NC','ND','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VT','VA','WA','WV','WI','WY','DC'])

def ext(s):
    toks=re.findall(r"\\b[A-Z]{2}\\b", s)
    toks=[t for t in toks if t in states]
    return toks[-1] if toks else None

df_b['state']=df_b['description'].apply(ext)
state_reviews=df_b.dropna(subset=['state']).groupby('state')['review_count'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)
top_state=state_reviews.index[0]
top_total=int(state_reviews.iloc[0])

rev=pd.DataFrame(var_call_8pw8v7DUMHjpgUNbH5wjf60S)
rev['n_reviews']=pd.to_numeric(rev['n_reviews'])
rev['avg_rating']=pd.to_numeric(rev['avg_rating'])

df_b['business_ref']=df_b['business_id'].astype(str).str.replace('businessid_','businessref_', regex=False)
refs=set(df_b.loc[df_b['state']==top_state,'business_ref'])
rev_state=rev[rev['business_ref'].isin(refs)]
weighted=float((rev_state['avg_rating']*rev_state['n_reviews']).sum()/rev_state['n_reviews'].sum())

out={'state':top_state,'total_reviews':top_total,'avg_rating':weighted}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(out))
